behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names utils.ts, utils.test.ts, function names resolveEntityDisplay/extractTeamIdFromApiKeyBreakdown, the exact test names, entity keys team-1/team-2, and the 83/63 test counts.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken and the expected behavior/signatures but doesn't provide implementation code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check function removal, presence of new test names, and vitest suite passing — these are behavioral constraints that alternative correct implementations would satisfy.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute vitest subprocesses to run actual test logic, plus some text checks for required renames.

test_not_tautological.reason: vitest suite must pass all 83/63 tests including behavioral assertions in utils.test.ts; stub implementations wouldn't pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover function removal, new function presence via behavior, test renames, mock data changes, and full suite passing.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names, docstrings explaining base vs fixed behavior, and section comments.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code refactoring, not structured data production.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names are consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file but localization of the bug is part of the task description, not internal line numbers.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits config task.
